tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated LDL cholesterol (113.3 mg/dL; normal <100 mg/dL). Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, and urine microalbumin are normal. Recommend addressing LDL elevation with lifestyle modification and/or medication as clinically indicated, considering cardiovascular risk factors. No acute laboratory concerns.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
